title: 日本ダービーの後に・今日を糧に

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Aww... I managed to hit the board, but I wasn't
able to take first...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I guess the Derby wall was a bit too high for me
to overcome...
choice_data_list: But that was some amazing running out there!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I gave it all I had... I can take pride in that.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And now, I'm gonna use my experience from
today to get even stronger!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'll make sure you get a title that's
bigger and better than even "Derby trainer"!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That means I gotta keep on training!
